name: sara7a
description: MenaCraft — Instagram Verification System with AI Pipeline

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail false -n SERVER,CLIENT,PYTHON -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client" "python -X utf8 server/python/app.py"
scripts.dev:no-python: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
